---
title: "Data Clean"
author: "Peng-Ting Kuo"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

# Setup

```{r packages}
devtools::install_github('xmarquez/AuthoritarianismBook')

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
    library(haven)
    library(tidyverse)
    library(ggplot2)
    library(ggeffects)
    library(lmtest)
    library(sandwich)
    library(car)
    library(fixest)
    library(AuthoritarianismBook)
    library(countrycode)
    library(modelsummary)
})
```

# Datasets

```{r Data Cleaning}
#-99 NA로 바꿨는지
# 버전 1: 원본 그대로 (Replication용)
dat_orig <- dat_merged 

# 버전 2: -99를 NA로 변환 (Corrected용)
dat_clean <- dat_merged
dat_clean[dat_clean == -99] <- NA

# 1. 데이터셋 전체에서 -99를 NA로 변환
dat_merged[dat_merged == -99] <- NA

# 2. 변환이 잘 되었는지 확인 (polity2_1의 Min 값이 -10 ~ 10 사이로 와야 함)
summary(dat_merged$polity2_1)


# [1] 원본 데이터 모델 (Stata 결과와 수치가 일치해야 함)
res_1_2_orig <- feglm(mzinit ~ machinejlw_1 + juntajlw_1 + bossjlw_1 + strongmanjlw_1 + 
                        allotherauts_1 + newregime_1 + democracy_2 + cap_1 + cap_2 + 
                        initshare + dependlow + majmaj + minmaj + majmin + 
                        contigdum + logdist + s_wt_glo + s_lead_1 + s_lead_2 + 
                        pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3,
                      data = subset(dat_orig, !is.na(democracy_1)),
                      family = "logit", cluster = ~dirdyadid)

# [2] -99 제거 데이터 모델 (실제 학술적 결론용)
res_1_2_clean <- feglm(mzinit ~ machinejlw_1 + juntajlw_1 + bossjlw_1 + strongmanjlw_1 + 
                         allotherauts_1 + newregime_1 + democracy_2 + cap_1 + cap_2 + 
                         initshare + dependlow + majmaj + minmaj + majmin + 
                         contigdum + logdist + s_wt_glo + s_lead_1 + s_lead_2 + 
                         pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3,
                       data = subset(dat_clean, !is.na(democracy_1)),
                       family = "logit", cluster = ~dirdyadid)

# 두 결과 비교 출력
etable(res_1_2_orig, res_1_2_clean, 
       headers = c("Original (-99 Incl.)", "Cleaned (-99 as NA)"))

coup <- read_csv("./ReplicationData/coup.csv")
df <- df %>%
  left_join(coup %>% select(ccode = cowcode, year, realized), 
            by = c("ccode1" = "cowcode", "year" = "year")) %>%
  mutate(log_oil_usd = ifelse(is.na(log_oil_usd), 0, realized))


# 1.9 Logit Interaction (M1.2 based)
# Equivalent to Stata's 'logit, robust cluster()'
M1_9 <- feglm(
  mzinit ~ i(machinejlw_1, L1.realized) + i(juntajlw_1, L1.realized) + 
           i(bossjlw_1, L1.realized) + i(strongmanjlw_1, L1.realized) + 
           allotherauts_1 + newregime_1 + democracy_2 + cap_1 + cap_2 + 
           initshare + dependlow + majmaj + minmaj + majmin + contigdum + 
           logdist + s_wt_glo + s_lead_1 + s_lead_2 + 
           pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3, 
  data = subset(df, !is.na(democracy_1)),
  family = "logit",
  vcov = ~dirdyadid # Clustering
)

# 1.10 FE Interaction (M1.4 based)
# Equivalent to Stata's 'xtlogit, fe'
M1_10 <- feglm(
  mzinit ~ i(machinejlw_1, L1.realized) + i(juntajlw_1, L1.realized) + 
           i(bossjlw_1, L1.realized) + i(strongmanjlw_1, L1.realized) + 
           allotherauts_1 + newregime_1 + cap_1 + cap_2 + 
           initshare + dependlow + majmaj + minmaj + majmin + 
           pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3 | dirdyadid, 
  data = subset(df, !is.na(democracy_1)),
  family = "logit"
)

# ============================================================================
# Result Comparison Table (Console)
# ============================================================================
msummary(list("Interaction (Logit)" = M1_9, "Interaction (FE)" = M1_10),
         stars = c('*' = .1, '**' = .05, '***' = .01),
         estimate = "{estimate} ({std.error})",
         title = "Interaction Effects of Regime Types and Lagged Coups")

# ============================================================================
# Export Final Table to Word/RTF
# ============================================================================
# Assuming M1_1 through M1_4 were previously defined
model_list <- list(
  "Logit(Coup_t)"   = M1_1, 
  "Logit(Coup_t-1)" = M1_2, 
  "FE(Coup_t)"      = M1_3, 
  "FE(Coup_t-1)"    = M1_4, 
  "Interact(Logit)" = M1_9, 
  "Interact(FE)"    = M1_10
)

modelsummary(
  model_list,
  output = "Final_Analysis_Table.rtf",
  stars = TRUE,
  title = "Table: The Effects of Coups and Regime Types on Conflict Initiation",
  gof_omit = 'AIC|BIC|Log.Lik|RMSE' # Cleaning up the footer
)
```

```{r dataset}
df <- read_stata("./ReplicationData/WeeksAPSR2012.dta")
colnames(df)
economic_data

levels(economic_data$variable)

oil_final <- Ross %>%
  select(year, GWn, cown, oil_usd = oil_gas_value_2014) %>%
  distinct(GWn, year, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(log_oil_usd = log(oil_usd + 1))

# 2. 合併回主資料集 (針對 Side A)
df <- df %>%
  left_join(oil_final %>% select(ccode = cown, year, log_oil_usd), 
            by = c("ccode1" = "ccode", "year" = "year")) %>%
  # 沒資料的視為不產油，補 0
  mutate(log_oil_usd = ifelse(is.na(log_oil_usd), 0, log_oil_usd))

summary(df$log_oil_usd)
hist(df$log_oil_usd, main="Distribution of Log Oil Wealth")
```

# Preprocessing

```{r}
# 篩選出有發動攻擊 (mzinit == 1) 的觀測值
initiations <- df[df$mzinit == 1, ]

# 建立一個函數來識別該年度 Side A 和 Side B 的政體名稱
get_regime_type <- function(data, suffix) {
  ifelse(data[[paste0("democracy", suffix)]] == 1, "Democracy",
  ifelse(data[[paste0("machinejlw", suffix)]] == 1, "Machine",
  ifelse(data[[paste0("juntajlw", suffix)]] == 1, "Junta",
  ifelse(data[[paste0("bossjlw", suffix)]] == 1, "Boss",
  ifelse(data[[paste0("strongmanjlw", suffix)]] == 1, "Strongman", "Other")))))
}

# 標註政體類型
initiations$type_A <- get_regime_type(initiations, "_1")
initiations$type_B <- get_regime_type(initiations, "_2")

# 產生交叉表：看 Side A 類型對 Side B 類型發動攻擊的次數
table(initiations$type_A, initiations$type_B)


df <- df %>%
  mutate(audience = case_when(
    machinejlw_1 == 1 ~ 1,
    bossjlw_1 == 1    ~ 1,
    juntajlw_1 == 1   ~ 0,
    strongmanjlw_1 == 1 ~ 0,
    TRUE              ~ NA_real_ 
  ))

df <- df %>%
    mutate(personList = case_when(
        bossjlw_1 == 1 ~ 1,
        strongmanjlw_1 == 1 ~ 1,
        machinejlw_1 == 1 ~ 0,
        juntajlw_1 == 1   ~ 0,
        TRUE              ~ NA_real_
    ))

df %>%
  group_by(audience) %>%
  summarise(
    machines = sum(machinejlw_1 == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    bosses = sum(bossjlw_1 == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    juntas = sum(juntajlw_1 == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    strongmen = sum(strongmanjlw_1 == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# 2. 執行 Logit 模型
model_interaction <- glm(
  mzinit ~ personList * audience + allotherauts_1 + cap_1 + cap_2 + 
           majmaj + minmaj + majmin + 
           pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3, 
  data = subset(df, !is.na(audience) & !is.na(personList)), 
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

# 3. 計算群聚標準誤
clustered_se <- vcovCL(model_interaction, cluster = ~dirdyadid)
coeftest(model_interaction, vcov = clustered_se)

pred_probs <- ggpredict(model_interaction, terms = c("audience [0,1]", "personList [0,1]"))

# 2. 繪製預測機率圖 (對應論文 Figure 4 的邏輯)
p1 <- ggplot(pred_probs, aes(x = factor(x), y = predicted, color = factor(group))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), width = 0.1) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0" = "Military", "1" = "Civilian")) +
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Personalist", labels = c("0" = "Constrained", "1" = "Personalist")) +
  labs(# title = "Predicted Probability of MID Initiation",
       x = NULL,
       y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p1)

ggsave("./Graph/typology_paper.png", plot = p1, width = 14, height = 14, units = "cm", dpi = 300)
```

```{r Regime Instability}
# There are 11 countries that are autocracy but start with 0 in 1946
df1946 <- df %>%
    filter(juntajlw_1 == 1 | strongmanjlw_1 == 1 | machinejlw_1 == 1 | bossjlw_1 == 1) %>%
    filter(year == 1946)

# 1. 定義 1946 年起始年資的種子資料 (根據歷史紀錄)
# 這些 ccode 對應：ALB, DOM, LBR, MEX, NIC, PAR, POR, RUS, SAL, SPN, YUG
seeds_data <- data.frame(
  ccode = c(339, 42, 450, 70, 92, 150, 235, 365, 91, 230, 345),
  start_tenure = c(2, 16, 2, 17, 10, 6, 14, 24, 15, 7, 1)
)

# 2. 定義一個通用的 Tenure 計算函數
# 此函數會處理「左截斷補值」與「NA 視為 0」的邏輯
calculate_tenure_ref <- function(data, country_col, regime_col, output_name) {
  
  # 將字串轉換為符號以供 dplyr 使用
  c_col <- sym(country_col)
  r_col <- sym(regime_col)
  
  data %>%
    # A. 提取唯一的「國家-年份-政權狀態」組合，避免配對資料導致重複累計
    distinct(!!c_col, year, !!r_col) %>%
    group_by(!!c_col) %>%
    arrange(year) %>%
    mutate(
      # B. 處理 NA：將 newregime 視為 0 (代表無變動) 
      reg_clean = ifelse(is.na(!!r_col), 0, !!r_col),
      is_start_year = (year == min(year)),
      
      # C. 判定政權更迭起點 (Onset)
      # 邏輯：第一年強制算起點；之後只有從 0 變成 1 的那一刻算新政權開始
      is_change = case_when(
        is_start_year ~ 1,
        reg_clean == 1 & lag(reg_clean, default = 0) == 0 ~ 1,
        TRUE ~ 0
      ),
      reg_id = cumsum(is_change)
    ) %>%
    group_by(!!c_col, reg_id) %>%
    mutate(
      # D. 計算在資料集內觀察到的存續年數
      years_obs = row_number() - 1,
      
      # E. 1946 年特殊補值 (僅針對那 11 個國家)
      seed = ifelse(first(year) == 1946 & first(!!c_col) %in% seeds_data$ccode,
                    seeds_data$start_tenure[match(first(!!c_col), seeds_data$ccode)],
                    0),
      
      # F. 最終計算結果
      final_val = seed + years_obs
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    # 只回傳關鍵欄位用於合併
    select(!!c_col, year, !!output_name := final_val)
}

# 3. 分別為 Side A (發動方) 與 Side B (目標方) 計算 Tenure
# 假設發動方變數為 ccode1/newregime_1，目標方為 ccode2/newregime_2
ref_init   <- calculate_tenure_ref(df, "ccode1", "newregime_1", "tenure_1")
ref_target <- calculate_tenure_ref(df, "ccode2", "newregime_2", "tenure_2")

# 4. 合併回原始資料集
df <- df %>%
    # 移除可能存在的舊 tenure 欄位避免衝突
    select(-any_of(c("tenure", "tenure_1", "tenure_2"))) %>%
    # 合併發動方年資
    left_join(ref_init, by = c("ccode1", "year")) %>%
    # 合併目標方年資
    left_join(ref_target, by = c("ccode2", "year")) %>%
    # log
    mutate(tenure_1_log = log(tenure_1 + 1),
           tenure_2_log = log(tenure_2 + 1))

df_ <- df %>% 
    filter(democracy_1 == 1)
df_[which.max(df_$tenure_1), c("ccode1", "abbrev1", "year", "tenure_1", "newregime_1")]

df %>%
    filter(ccode1 == 2) %>%
    select(year, tenure_1, newregime_1)
```

```{r Analysis}
m1_1 <- feglm(
  mzinit ~ machinejlw_1 + juntajlw_1 + bossjlw_1 + strongmanjlw_1 + allotherauts_1 + 
           cap_1 + cap_2 + majmaj + minmaj + majmin + 
           pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3,
  data = subset(df, !is.na(democracy_1)), # 對應 if democracy_1 != .
  family = "binomial",
  cluster = ~dirdyadid # 對應 cluster(dirdyadid)
)

# --- Table 1.2 (完整模型) ---
m1_2 <- feglm(
  mzinit ~ machinejlw_1 + juntajlw_1 + bossjlw_1 + strongmanjlw_1 + allotherauts_1 + 
           tenure_1_log + democracy_2 + cap_1 + cap_2 + initshare + dependlow + log_oil_usd +
           majmaj + minmaj + majmin + contigdum + logdist + s_wt_glo +  
           s_lead_1 + s_lead_2 + pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3,
  data = subset(df, !is.na(democracy_1)),
  family = "binomial",
  cluster = ~dirdyadid
)

m1_3 <- feglm(
  mzinit ~ machinejlw_1 + juntajlw_1 + bossjlw_1 + strongmanjlw_1 + allotherauts_1 + 
           cap_1 + cap_2 + majmaj + minmaj + majmin + 
           pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3 | dirdyadid, # | 後方接 FE
  data = subset(df, !is.na(democracy_1)),
  family = "binomial"
)

# --- Table 1.4 (FE 完整模型) ---
# 注意：此模型會自動剔除不隨時間變動的變數 (如距離、鄰接性) [cite: 673]
m1_4 <- feglm(
  mzinit ~ machinejlw_1 + juntajlw_1 + bossjlw_1 + strongmanjlw_1 + allotherauts_1 + 
           tenure_1_log + tenure_2_log + cap_1 + cap_2 + initshare + dependlow + 
           majmaj + minmaj + majmin + log_oil_usd + democracy_2 + contigdum + logdist + s_wt_glo +  s_lead_1 + s_lead_2 +
           pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3 | dirdyadid,
  data = subset(df, !is.na(democracy_1)),
  family = "binomial"
)



# 1. 將模型放入一個具名的清單中
models_list <- list(
  "Pooled (Basic)" = m1_1,
  "Pooled (Full)"  = m1_2,
  "FE (Basic)"     = m1_3,
  "FE (Full)"      = m1_4
)

modelsummary(
  models_list,
  stars = TRUE,                                # 顯示顯著性星星 (* p < 0.1, ** p < 0.05, *** p < 0.01) [cite: 52, 67]
  coef_rename = c(                             # 重新命名變數讓表格更專業
    "machinejlw_1"   = "Machine",
    "juntajlw_1"     = "Junta",
    "bossjlw_1"      = "Boss",
    "strongmanjlw_1" = "Strongman",
    "tenure_1_log"   = "Tenure (Side A, log)",
    "log_oil_usd"    = "Petro",
    "tenure_2_log"   = "Tenure (Side B, log)",
    "cap_1"          = "Capabilities (Side A)",
    "cap_2"          = "Capabilities (Side B)"
  ),
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared", "logLik"),  # 選擇要顯示的診斷統計量
  title = "Table 1: Regime Type and MID Initiation",
  notes = "Standard errors are clustered by directed dyad."
)

# 直接並排顯示，並自動進行群聚標準誤調整
etable(
  m1_1, m1_2, m1_3, m1_4,
  cluster = "dirdyadid",                       # 確保所有模型的標準誤都經過群聚調整 
  subtitles = c("Basic", "Full", "FE-Basic", "FE-Full"),
  dict = c(                                    # 字典功能用於轉換變數名稱
    machinejlw_1 = "Machine", 
    juntajlw_1 = "Junta",
    tenure_1_log = "Log Tenure"
  ),
  order = c("Machine", "Junta", "Boss", "Strongman"), # 調整變數出現順序
  tex = FALSE                                  # 若設為 TRUE 則直接輸出 LaTeX 代碼
)
```

```{r Visualization}
library(ggeffects)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# 1. 分別計算五種政體類型的預測值
# 我們固定其他變數在平均值，並設定對應的政體 dummy 為 1
# 所有的 condition 設定確保一次只有一種政體被啟動

# (A) Democracy (基準組：所有威權 dummy 皆為 0)
p_dem <- ggpredict(m1_2, terms = "tenure_1_log [all]", 
                   condition = c(machinejlw_1=0, juntajlw_1=0, bossjlw_1=0, strongmanjlw_1=0, allotherauts_1=0))
p_dem$group <- "Democracy"

# (B) Machine
p_mac <- ggpredict(m1_2, terms = "tenure_1_log [all]", 
                   condition = c(machinejlw_1=1, juntajlw_1=0, bossjlw_1=0, strongmanjlw_1=0, allotherauts_1=0))
p_mac$group <- "Machine"

# (C) Junta
p_jun <- ggpredict(m1_2, terms = "tenure_1_log [all]", 
                   condition = c(machinejlw_1=0, juntajlw_1=1, bossjlw_1=0, strongmanjlw_1=0, allotherauts_1=0))
p_jun$group <- "Junta"

# (D) Boss
p_bos <- ggpredict(m1_2, terms = "tenure_1_log [all]", 
                   condition = c(machinejlw_1=0, juntajlw_1=0, bossjlw_1=1, strongmanjlw_1=0, allotherauts_1=0))
p_bos$group <- "Boss"

# (E) Strongman
p_str <- ggpredict(m1_2, terms = "tenure_1_log [all]", 
                   condition = c(machinejlw_1=0, juntajlw_1=0, bossjlw_1=0, strongmanjlw_1=1, allotherauts_1=0))
p_str$group <- "Strongman"

# 2. 合併所有預測結果
all_regimes_pred <- rbind(p_dem, p_mac, p_jun, p_bos, p_str)

# 3. 繪圖
p2 <- ggplot(all_regimes_pred, aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = group, fill = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.1, color = NA) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) round(exp(x) - 1, 0)) + # 將 Log 轉回實際年數
  labs(
    # title = "Predicted Probability of MID Initiation by Regime Type",
    # subtitle = "Varying Side A Tenure (Based on Model 1.2)",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    color = "Regime Type",
    fill = "Regime Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("./Graph/tenure_plot.png", plot = p2, width = 14, height = 12, dpi = 300, unit = "cm")
```

# Alliance & Cold War

```{r Alliance}
alliance <- read.csv("../selenium/WTO_Analysis/Data/ATOP_5.1/atop5_1ddyr.csv")
alliance <- alliance %>%
    filter(year >= 1946 & year <=1999) %>%
    select(stateA, stateB, year, atopally, defense, offense, neutral, nonagg, consul)

df <- df %>%
  left_join(alliance, by = c("ccode1" = "stateA", "ccode2" = "stateB", "year"))

atop_cols <- c("atopally", "defense", "offense", "neutral", "nonagg", "consul")
df[atop_cols][is.na(df[atop_cols])] <- 0

# cold war
df <- df %>%
    mutate(cold_war = ifelse(year > 1991, 0, 1))

# --- 模型 1.1: 基礎擴充模型 (Pooled Logit) ---
# 目的：驗證加入 Tenure_1 後，原本的政體效果是否依然穩健。
m1_1 <- feglm(
  mzinit ~ machinejlw_1 + juntajlw_1 + bossjlw_1 + strongmanjlw_1 + allotherauts_1 + 
           tenure_1_log + defense + offense + neutral + nonagg + consul +  # 新增變數
           cap_1 + cap_2 + majmaj + minmaj + majmin + 
           pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3,
  data = subset(df, !is.na(democracy_1)),
  family = "binomial",
  cluster = ~dirdyadid
)

# --- 模型 1.2: 完整互動模型 (Pooled Logit + Interaction) ---
# 目的：測試「誰攻擊誰」的邏輯。例如：強人是否更敢攻擊「沒盟友」或「沒經驗」的國家？
m1_2 <- feglm(
  mzinit ~ machinejlw_1 + juntajlw_1 + bossjlw_1 + strongmanjlw_1 + allotherauts_1 + 
           tenure_1_log + tenure_2_log + defense + offense + neutral + nonagg + consul + cold_war + 
           cap_1 + cap_2 + initshare + dependlow + 
           majmaj + minmaj + majmin + contigdum + logdist + s_wt_glo + 
           s_lead_1 + s_lead_2 + pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3,
  data = subset(df, !is.na(democracy_1)),
  family = "binomial",
  cluster = ~dirdyadid
)

# --- 模型 1.3: 基礎固定效應模型 (Fixed Effects) ---
# 目的：控制配對特徵，看「同一個國家」隨著變老（Tenure）或簽署盟約（ATOP）後的行為變化。
m1_3 <- feglm(
  mzinit ~ machinejlw_1 + juntajlw_1 + bossjlw_1 + strongmanjlw_1 + allotherauts_1 + 
           tenure_1_log + defense + offense + neutral + nonagg + consul + 
           cap_1 + cap_2 + majmaj + minmaj + majmin + 
           pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3 | dirdyadid,
  data = subset(df, !is.na(democracy_1)),
  family = "binomial"
)

# --- 模型 1.4: 終極擴充模型 (FE + 多重控制) ---
# 目的：排除所有不隨時間變動的干擾因素，這是目前國際關係研究最嚴謹的設定。
m1_4 <- feglm(
  mzinit ~ machinejlw_1 + juntajlw_1 + bossjlw_1 + strongmanjlw_1 + allotherauts_1 + 
           tenure_1_log + tenure_2_log + defense + offense + neutral + nonagg + consul + cold_war + # FE 內也可以放，因為它隨時間變動
           cap_1 + cap_2 + initshare + dependlow + 
           majmaj + minmaj + majmin + 
           pcyrsmzinit + pcyrsmzinits1 + pcyrsmzinits2 + pcyrsmzinits3 | dirdyadid,
  data = subset(df, !is.na(democracy_1)),
  family = "binomial"
)
```

```{r}
library(modelsummary)

# 1. 建立模型清單
models_list <- list(
  "Pooled (Basic)" = m1_1,
  "Pooled (Int)"   = m1_2,
  "FE (Basic)"     = m1_3,
  "FE (Full)"      = m1_4
)

# 2. 定義要顯示的變數名稱 (讓表格更專業)
cm <- c(
  "machinejlw_1"            = "Machine",
  "juntajlw_1"              = "Junta",
  "bossjlw_1"               = "Boss",
  "strongmanjlw_1"          = "Strongman",
  "tenure_1_log"            = "Tenure (Side A, log)",
  "tenure_2_log"            = "Tenure (Side B, log)",
  # "atopally"                = "Alliance (ATOP)",
  # "strongmanjlw_1:atopally" = "Strongman x Alliance",
  "defense" = "Defense",
  "offense" = "Offense",
  "neutral" = "Neutral",
  "nonagg"  = "nonagg",
  "consul"  = "consul",
  "cold_war"                = "Cold War"
)

# 3. 輸出表格
modelsummary(
  models_list,
  stars = TRUE,
  coef_map = cm,           # 只顯示關鍵政體與時間變數
  cluster = "dirdyadid",       # 確保顯示群聚標準誤
  gof_omit = "AIC|BIC|Log.Lik|Std.Errors",
  title = "Regime Type, Tenure, and Alliances on MID Initiation",
  notes = "Standard errors clustered by directed dyad."
)
```
